# Research - 2026-07-05

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> Sunday. Weekly repos (aider, claude-code) monthly-gated, skipped.
> One NEW cross-repo signal: opencode #35356 + kilocode #11923 both
> shipped user-decline halting in 12h. Prior #1, #2, #4 still open;
> prior #3 (AbortSignal in `sendChat`) LANDED at
> `orchestrator.ts:15-21,86`.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~3h, NEW)**: `src/tool/index.ts:451-456` returns
  `{success:false, error:'Permission denied: ...'}` for BOTH policy
  denies and user declines; `agenticChat.ts:685-703` feeds either
  back as a tool result, so the loop retries after a human said "no".
  Two upstreams (opencode `709af58`, kilocode `771f8c8`) shipped the
  same fix inside a 12h window.
- **#2 (~3h, RE-SURFACED)**: `agenticChat.ts:225` still bare
  `JSON.parse` (issues #916 / #911).
- **#3 (~2h, RE-SURFACED)**: agent-switch marker absent
  (`grep 'agent_switch\|pendingSwitch' src -r` = 0 hits). #917 / #914.
- **#4 (~1h, RE-SURFACED)**: `stripInternalOptions`
  (`agent/index.ts:105`) invoked only by tests. #905 / #899.
- **Deferred**: opencode `#35192` (heavy Effect OpenAPI adapter),
  `#35185` (internal code-mode flag), `#35292` / `#35269` / `#34747`
  (desktop/timeline UI); kilocode PRs merged today are
  `fix(vscode)` / RTL input / balance chip - no CLI surface. Cline:
  no commits since 2026-07-04 02:31Z.
- **Rotation**: no changes. Daily set produced signal today; monthly
  set resumes 2026-08-03.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Distinguish user-declined vs policy-denied; halt on decline (tools + core, ~3h)

- **What**: Add `PermissionDeclinedError` in `src/permission/index.ts`
  (shape mirrors `next.ts:223` `DeniedError`). In
  `src/tool/index.ts:444-456`, when `permissionManager.check(...)`
  returns `{granted:false, reason:'user_declined'}` (ask-path, not
  policy) throw it instead of returning a generic failure. In
  `agenticChat.ts:685` catch it, set `finalText = '[User declined
  permission for <tool> on <resource>]'` and `break` the loop. Policy
  denies keep the current model-facing string so the model can pick a
  different tool. Wire `--yolo` / `--dangerously-skip-permissions` to
  never raise (matches kilocode #11923 auto-approve). Tests:
  user_declined -> loop halts; policy_deny -> loop continues;
  yolo -> no error either way.
- **Why**: A human answering "n" to a bash-ask is
  wire-indistinguishable from a policy-deny today; the model retries
  with `--force` or a different resource. Two independent upstreams
  shipped the same fix in 12h with the same
  `RejectedError` -> `DeclinedError` rename + interrupt design.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#35356 (`709af58`, 2026-07-04 21:17Z) +
  kilocode/kilocode#11923 (`771f8c8`, 2026-07-03 16:38Z).
- **Category**: tools. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Lenient tool-call argument parsing + shaped Zod errors (tools, ~3h)

- **What**: Replace `JSON.parse` at `agenticChat.ts:225` with fast
  path plus local repair on `SyntaxError` (trailing commas, balance
  braces/brackets, unwrap single-quoted strings). On Zod errors,
  format `err.issues[0].path` + `.message` so the model self-corrects.
  ~40 lines, no new dep. Full spec in
  `2026-07-04-research.md:33-52`.
- **Source**: cline/cline#12061 (`a1d69fe`, 2026-07-04); issues #916,
  #911.
- **Category**: tools. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 3. Stamp `<agent_switch/>` marker on next outbound user turn (agent, ~2h)

- **What**: On `switchTo` (`agent/index.ts:254`) record a pending
  switch. In the next `sendChat` / `agenticChat` prepend
  `<agent_switch from="X" to="Y"/>` to the first user turn. Add
  `stripInternalWrappers` in TUI + `sessions export` so it never
  reaches the user. Full spec in `2026-07-04-research.md:54-73`.
- **Source**: cline/cline#12057 (`b5468e1`, 2026-07-03) + #12058;
  issues #917, #914.
- **Category**: agent. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 4. Wire `stripInternalOptions` into provider dispatch (provider, ~1h)

- **What**: Call `stripInternalOptions(merged)` in `agenticChat` and
  `streamingOrchestrator` before every `provider.complete()` /
  `provider.stream()`. Spy-based test asserts no internal keys reach
  the provider. Some SAP proxy deployments 400 on unknown top-level
  keys.
- **Source**: prior `2026-07-04-research.md:22-24`; issues #905, #899.
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~1h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: #1 (new + convergent upstream signal), #2 (largest
   impact on cheap-model turn success), #3 (trustworthy switches),
   #4 (trivial wire-up).
2. **Do NOT** conflate #1 with a broad "propagate error kinds"
   refactor. Minimal shape is one new symbol + two catch sites; keep
   `router.ts` and `sessionManager.ts` untouched.
3. **No demotions**: monthly set (aider, claude-code) resumes first
   Monday of August per `agent1-research-system.md:22-23`.
